items.text2: An Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) is a company that produces parts or equipment that are then used and sold by another company under its own brand.

items.title: Take a break
items.text: Step away from your screen every 1 hour. Short breaks reduce eye strain and improve focus.

items.title: Stay hydrated
items.text: Keep a bottle of water at your desk. Hydration supports concentration and overall well-being.

items.title: Simple stretching
items.text: A few minutes of stretching keeps muscles relaxed and helps prevent tension. Your body will thank you.
